name: A664MsgConfig
title: A664MsgConfig
syntax: long A664MsgConfig (a664Frame aFrame, dword IpFrag, dword Line, dword SubVlId) (1)
long A664MsgConfig (a664Message aMessage, dword IpFrag, dword Line, dword SubVlId) (2)
description: Configure the Tx parameters for a given a664Frame or a664Message.

parameters.name: IpFrag
parameters.description: (this parameter is ignored for a664Frame): 0 no IP fragmentation 1 message may be fragmented

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: Short Name Description Interface_ID updated? Message duplicated?
— Line assignment is derived from the VL settings (selector LineSelect) • •

parameters.name: SubVlId
parameters.description: Specify the SubVLid, used for this message or frame. The allowed value range is 1 .. 4. The value is not checked against the selector SubVLNr.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
